notes: Updates About & Privacy for optional Google Tasks and Google Calendar sync.
Adds Settings > Backup & restore for Pathmark Sync.
Creates separate timestamped Pathmark Backup Google Sheets.
Adds restore from backup with a safety backup first.
Adds restore Pathmark Sync to default with optional starter examples.
